falsification_conditions.condition: SPX closes below 4950 on any single day in the next 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: The bottom_2024_aug pattern typically featured shallow, short-lived pullbacks with no closes below key support; a break below 4950 would violate the structural integrity of the pattern and suggest a deeper correction than the template allows

falsification_conditions.condition: VIX closes above 25 for 3 consecutive days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: The August 2024 bottom was characterized by rapid VIX compression and stabilization below 20; sustained elevated fear would contradict the post-panic stabilization phase that defines this pattern match

falsification_conditions.condition: 10Y Treasury yield drops more than 40 basis points from current level within 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: The bottom_2024_aug pattern occurred during a yield stabilization/rising phase; a sharp flight-to-quality bid in bonds would indicate macro stress inconsistent with the 'soft landing confidence' regime this pattern requires

doctrine: If you can't list what would prove your call wrong, you don't have a real call.
